train_3968.llm_answer: Consumer advocate: there is no doubt that the government is responsible for the increased cost of gasoline, because the government's policies have significantly increased consumer demand for fuel, and as a result of increasing demand, the price of gasoline has risen steadily; the government can bear responsibility for that which it directly causes.

train_316.llm_answer: Statement1: To suit the needs of corporate clients, advertising agencies have successfully modified a strategy originally developed for political campaigns. train_4399.llm_answer: Statement1: Consumer magazine : because front-loading washers use more water than top-loading washers, ordinary powder detergent dissolves readily in front-loading washers. train_2130.llm_answer: Statement1: The dean of computing must be respected by the academic staff and be competent to oversee the use of computers on campus. Statement2: The only deans whom academics respect are those who hold doctoral degrees, and only someone who really knows about computers can competently oversee the use of computers on campus. Furthermore, the board of trustees has decided that the dean of computing must be selected from among this university's staff. Therefore, the dean of computing must be a professor from this university's computer science department.
train_2130.llm_explanation: By removing the condition that only those in the computer science department really know about computers (Premise1), and keeping the condition that every professor with a doctoral degree in computer science really knows about computers (Premise2), Premise2 becomes necessary to support the conclusion that the dean must be from the computer science department.

train_1423.llm_answer: Statement1: Consumer advocate : ephedra is a naturally occurring compound that some people use as a weight-loss aid. Statement2: Recently, the government prohibited the sale of dietary supplements containing ephedra on the grounds that ephedra has been shown to have grave side effects. train_1423.llm_explanation: Premise2 (Before the prohibition, ephedra had been available in health food stores) now serves as a necessary assumption because the argument relies on the comparison between the availability of ephedra and echinacea before the prohibition. train_594.llm_answer: Statement1: Often patients with ankle fractures that are stable, and thus do not require surgery, are given follow-up x-rays because their general practitioners are concerned about possibly having misjudged the stability of the fracture. train_3979.llm_answer: More and more law firms specializing in corporate taxes are paid on a contingency-fee basis. train_4104.llm_answer: It is popularly believed that a poem has whatever meaning is assigned to it by the reader. But objective evaluation of poetry is possible only if the aesthetic value of a poem can be discussed; for two readers cannot agree on the correct interpretation of the poem.
train_4104.llm_explanation: By modifying the Statements, we've made Premise 2 provide a necessary assumption to the Argument, which requires that two readers can agree on the correct interpretation of the poem for an objective evaluation to be possible. train_1182.llm_answer: Statement1: Critic: rock music is musically bankrupt and socially destructive, but at least the album covers of rock lps from the 1960s and 1970s often featured innovative visual art. Statement2: But now, since the success of digital music has almost ended the production of lps, the only music that still comes in a physical format is rock music.

train_2941.llm_answer: Music critic: fewer and fewer musicians are studying classical music, decreasing the likelihood that those with real aptitude for such music will be performing it. train_939.llm_answer: Statement1: Twelve years ago and again five years ago, there were extended periods when the darfir republic's currency, the pundra, was weak : its value was unusually low relative to the world's most stable currencies. train_1248.llm_answer: Statement1: Educator : some experimental educational programs, based on the principle that children's first education should take place at home, instruct parents in how to be their child's "first teacher." train_4022.llm_answer: Statement1: Super express shipping company has implemented a new distribution system that can get almost every package to its destination the day after it is sent. The company worries that this more efficient system will result in lower sales of its premium next-day delivery service, because its two day service will usually arrive the following day anyway. Statement2: The company plans to encourage sales of its next-day service by intentionally delaying delivery of its two-day packages so that they will not be delivered the following day, even if the package arrives at its destination city in time for next-day delivery.
train_4022.llm_explanation: By modifying Statement2 to focus on the pricing of the two-day service, Premise2 now provides a sufficient assumption to the Argument, implying that the company's two-day service is cheap enough to be a viable alternative to next-day delivery, making the deliberate delay a way to steer customers towards the more expensive next-day service.

train_2437.llm_answer: The photographs that the store developed were quite unsatisfactory. The customer claims to have handled the film correctly. Neither the film nor the camera was defective. train_2644.llm_answer: Statement1: Human intelligence is not possible without the ability to identify emotions. Statement2: A computer is something that can never identify its emotions, so for that reason alone a computer will never be able to display intelligence.

train_3914.llm_answer: The miscarriage of justice in the barker case was due to the mistaken views held by some of the forensic scientists involved in the case, who believed that they owed allegiance only to the prosecuting lawyers. train_4467.llm_answer: Naturalist : sent2: the recent claims that the tasmanian tiger is not extinct are false. In spite of alleged sightings of the animal, the tasmanian tiger no longer exists.

train_390.llm_answer: The proposed tax reform legislation is being criticized by political groups on the right for being too specific and by political groups on the left for being vague about its goals, but since one and the same statement can not be both too specific and too vague, the criticisms just go to show that the legislation is framed just as it should be.

train_168.llm_answer: If one wants to succeed, then one should act as though one were genuinely confident about one's abilities, even if one actually distrusts one's skills. train_2814.llm_answer: Statement1: A company has developed a new sensing device that, according to the company's claims, detects weak, ultralow-frequency electromagnetic signals associated with a beating heart. train_2710.llm_answer: Statement1: Virginia and her brother william disagree over when their father was born : virginia claims it was in 1935 and william claims it was in 1933. sent2: the hospital where their father was born has no records for 1933 but has complete records for 1935 -- records that do not include a birth record for their father. train_3939.llm_answer: Human skin gives off an array of gaseous substances, including carbon dioxide and lactic acid, both of which attract mosquitoes. train_2662.llm_answer: Downtown petropolis boasted over 100 large buildings 5 years ago. Statement2: Since then, 60 of those buildings have been demolished. train_548.llm_answer: Acme's bank loan must be immediately repaid in full if acme's earnings fall below $ 1 million per year. train_1170.llm_answer: Companies wishing to boost sales of merchandise should use in-store displays to catch customers' attention. train_97.llm_answer: Art critic: nowadays, museum visitors seldom pause to look at a work of art for even a full minute. They look, perhaps take a snapshot, and move on. train_2815.llm_answer: Critic : people today place an especially high value on respect for others ; yet, in their comedy acts, many of today's most popular comedians display blatant disrespect for others. train_3551.llm_answer: Politician : a major social problem is children hurting other children. The results of a recent experiment by psychologists establish that watching violent films is at least partly responsible for this aggressive behavior. Statement2: The psychologists conducted an experiment in which one group of children watched a film of people punching bobo the clown dolls. A second group of children was not shown the film. Afterward, both groups of children played together in a room containing a bobo doll. Most of the children who had seen the film punched the bobo doll, while most of the other children did not. Some children who had not been shown the film imitated the behavior of those who had been shown the film and who punched the doll, but only if they had previously seen a child being punished for punching the doll.
train_3551.llm_explanation: The modification changes Premise 2 to suggest that the imitation of behavior is not a direct result of watching the film, but rather a result of observing the consequences of that behavior. This weakens the argument by introducing a third variable that could be responsible for the imitation, rather than the film itself.

train_838.llm_answer: Margaret came home after a long day of work to find her front door open and her waste basket knocked over with all of the contents strewn about the kitchen floor.
